name: PCBs
description: Printed circuit boards used as the foundational substrate for electronic component assemblies.

name: Semiconductors
description: Integrated circuits, processors, and chips that form the computational core of electronic devices.

name: Connectors
description: Electrical connectors and interfaces that link electronic components, subsystems, and wire harnesses.

name: Capacitors
description: Passive electronic components that store and release electrical energy, essential in every circuit board.

name: Display Panels
description: LCD, OLED, and LED display assemblies used in consumer electronics and industrial instrumentation.

name: Memory Chips
description: DRAM, NAND flash, and other semiconductor memory devices used for data storage and processing.

name: Rare Earth Magnets
description: Neodymium-iron-boron and samarium-cobalt permanent magnets used in motors, actuators, and sensors.

name: Battery Cells
description: Lithium-ion and lithium-polymer cells used in portable devices, power tools, and EV battery packs.

name: Enclosures
description: Plastic and metal housings that protect electronic assemblies from mechanical and environmental hazards.

name: Cables
description: Wiring harnesses, power cables, and high-speed data transmission cables for electronic systems.

name: Precision Sensors
description: Temperature, pressure, motion, and optical sensors used in industrial automation and consumer products.

name: Metal Castings
description: Die-cast and investment-cast metal components for structural, thermal management, and mechanical applications.

name: Assembly Services
description: Contract manufacturing and PCB assembly services for full product build, test, and integration.

name: Hard Drives
description: Mechanical hard disk drives and solid-state drives used for mass data storage in computing systems.

name: Specialty Components
description: Custom or proprietary components with unique specifications not available as standard commodity parts.

name: Automotive Parts
description: Precision-engineered components for automotive powertrains, safety systems, and embedded electronics.
